programme.desc: S1 E846 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: S1 E2072 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S2 E344 Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: Different generations discover love in unique ways, shaping a story that evolves with time, reflecting tradition, change and the constant pull of family.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E30 Arnav and Khushi are complete opposites but fall in love eventually despite all their differences and their many misunderstandings.
programme.title: Iss Pyaar Ko Kya Naam Doon

programme.desc: S1 E2 As a man's family arrives to meet Geet, she begs to remain unmarried. Darjee apologises to everyone for Geet's immaturity.
programme.title: Geet-Hui Sabse Parayi
